html:query.declare: <REP e_periodo="202002" empresa="101" chkFechaIngreso="" chkFuncion="" chkSueldoBasico="" chkTipoPersonal="" chkConCat=""><LEG d_29_2="06:00" d_29_1="22:00" d_27_2="06:00" d_27_1="22:00" d_26_2="06:00" d_26_1="22:00" d_25_2="06:00" d_25_1="22:00" d_24_2="06:00" d_24_1="22:00" d_22_2="06:00" d_22_1="22:00" d_21_2="06:00" d_21_1="22:00" d_20_2="06:00" d_20_1="22:00" d_19_2="06:00" d_19_1="22:00" d_17_2="06:00" d_17_1="22:00" d_16_2="06:00" d_16_1="22:00" d_15_2="06:00" d_15_1="22:00" d_14_2="06:00" d_14_1="22:00" d_12_2="06:00" d_12_1="22:00" d_11_2="06:00" d_11_1="22:00" d_10_2="06:00" d_10_1="22:00" dia="29" d_9_2="06:00" d_9_1="22:00" d_7_2="23:00" d_7_1="22:00" d_6_2="06:00" d_6_1="22:00" d_5_2="06:00" d_5_1="22:00" d_4_2="06:00" d_4_1="22:00" d_1_2="06:00" d_1_1="22:00" hayEventos="1" cant="2" cant_s="0" cant_e="0" convenio="01 Empleados de Comercio - ADMA Administrativo A" n_valor_hora="2.300,00" d_tipo_personal="Mensualizado Full" f_ingreso="02/01/2010" d_funcion="Consultoría" f_nacim="16/04/1983" c_nro_cuil="20-30169169-7" c_sexo="M" d_estado_civil="Soltero" d_nacionalidad="Argentino" e_numero_legajo="1" d_ape_y_nom="Campos, Eduardo Gaston" numeracion="1" /><LEG d_27_2="18:00" d_27_1="09:00" d_26_2="18:00" d_26_1="09:00" d_25_2="18:00" d_25_1="09:00" d_24_2="18:00" d_24_1="09:00" d_21_2="18:00" d_21_1="09:00" d_20_2="18:00" d_20_1="09:00" d_19_2="18:00" d_19_1="09:00" d_18_2="18:00" d_18_1="09:00" d_17_2="18:00" d_17_1="09:00" d_14_2="18:00" d_14_1="09:00" d_13_2="18:00" d_13_1="09:00" d_12_2="18:00" d_12_1="09:00" d_11_2="18:00" d_11_1="09:00" d_10_2="18:00" d_10_1="09:00" dia="29" d_7_2="18:00" d_7_1="09:00" d_6_2="18:00" d_6_1="09:00" d_5_2="18:00" d_5_1="09:00" d_4_2="18:00" d_4_1="09:00" d_3_2="18:00" d_3_1="09:00" hayEventos="1" cant="0" cant_s="0" cant_e="0" convenio="00 Fuera de convenio - Adm A Administrativo A" n_valor_hora="2.300,00" d_tipo_personal="Mensualizado Full" f_ingreso="02/01/2019" d_funcion="Consultoría" f_nacim="13/04/1994" c_nro_cuil="27377725749" c_sexo="F" d_estado_civil="Soltero" d_nacionalidad="Argentino" e_numero_legajo="40175" d_ape_y_nom="Maldonado, Vanesa" numeracion="2" /><DIAS><DIA descDia="Sábado" max="2" dia="1" /><DIA descDia="Domingo" max="0" dia="2" /><DIA descDia="Lunes" max="2" dia="3" /><DIA descDia="Martes" max="2" dia="4" /><DIA descDia="Miércoles" max="2" dia="5" /><DIA descDia="Jueves" max="2" dia="6" /><DIA descDia="Viernes" max="2" dia="7" /><DIA descDia="Sábado" max="0" dia="8" /><DIA descDia="Domingo" max="2" dia="9" /><DIA descDia="Lunes" max="2" dia="10" /><DIA descDia="Martes" max="2" dia="11" /><DIA descDia="Miércoles" max="2" dia="12" /><DIA descDia="Jueves" max="2" dia="13" /><DIA descDia="Viernes" max="2" dia="14" /><DIA descDia="Sábado" max="2" dia="15" /><DIA descDia="Domingo" max="2" dia="16" /><DIA descDia="Lunes" max="2" dia="17" /><DIA descDia="Martes" max="2" dia="18" /><DIA descDia="Miércoles" max="2" dia="19" /><DIA descDia="Jueves" max="2" dia="20" /><DIA descDia="Viernes" max="2" dia="21" /><DIA descDia="Sábado" max="2" dia="22" /><DIA descDia="Domingo" max="0" dia="23" /><DIA descDia="Lunes" max="2" dia="24" /><DIA descDia="Martes" max="2" dia="25" /><DIA descDia="Miércoles" max="2" dia="26" /><DIA descDia="Jueves" max="2" dia="27" /><DIA descDia="Viernes" max="0" dia="28" /><DIA descDia="Sábado" max="2" dia="29" /></DIAS></REP>

qry:select.name: qry_empresa
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_cuit, ORG34_ACTIVIDADES.d_actividad, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_domicilio FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS, ORG34_ACTIVIDADES JOIN ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_actividad INNER ORG34_ACTIVIDADES.oi_actividad WHERE ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = {#FILTRO:@empresa} ')/ROWS/ROW
